commit.subject: LU-17077 tests: reset group quotas in test_dom
commit.message:
LU-17077 tests: reset group quotas in test_dom

test_dom should reset quota limits for the most recent quota type that
is passed as an argument. Before this patch, quotas were reset only
for the user causing random failures for the project.

Fixes: d30f9e6b6c ("LU-11425 quota: support quota for DoM")
Fixes: 444d29c218 ("LU-18938 obdclass: delay an object free")
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-quota env=ONLY=63,ONLY_REPEAT=50
Signed-off-by: Sergey Cheremencev <scherementsev@ddn.com>
Change-Id: Ic8a0d68e8f82ed2b144c4f76ffbe96d4c1b625fb
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/65290
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Mikhail Pershin <mpershin@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
